settings.message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind — the more detail you share, the faster we can help.

settings.svg_icon: <svg viewbox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"></polyline></svg>
settings.title: Response time
settings.text: Our team responds to every inquiry within 24-48 hours on weekdays. For urgent matters concerning your order, please provide your order number so we can prioritize your request.
settings.badge_text: Usually within a few hours on weekdays

settings.svg_icon: <svg viewbox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"></path><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"></polyline></svg>

settings.text: Would you prefer to write to us personally? Then you can reach us at:

settings.title: Questions & Answers
settings.a1: Your order will be processed within 24-48 hours and is usually delivered within 4-7 business days. As soon as your package is on its way, you will automatically receive a tracking number via email.
settings.a2: Yes — you can easily return your order within 30 days. If you're not satisfied, simply contact our support team and we'll find a quick solution together.
settings.q3: Is the product easy to clean?
settings.a3: Yes, the material is very easy to clean and designed for everyday use. Dirt can be easily removed with a damp cloth.

settings.form_subtitle: Fill in the form and a real member of our team will reply to your email — typically within a few hours on weekdays.
settings.form_note: We'll reply to your email within 24 hours · No bots
settings.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. A real member of our team will reply to your email within 24 hours.
